title: limonium gallicum
intro: Limonium gallicum, also known as sea lavender or statice, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its health benefits include antioxidant and immune-boosting properties, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-anxiety effects. Limonium gallicum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy and as a natural dye.
